Bind Affinity  

Description

1: Bind Affinity

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 6 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: PC, Group Only Spell Type: Beneficial, Group Only
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

You cast: You cast Bind Affinity.
Other cast: Soandso casts Bind Affinity.
Cast on you: You feel yourself bind to the area.
Cast on other: Soandso is bound to the area.

Game Description

Binds the soul of your target to their current location. Use of this spell is often limited to towns and cities.

Items with this effect

  • Cloak of Souls
  • Locket of Escape
  • Ring of the Dead [Bind Affinity]
  • Spell: Bind Affinity [bought]
  • Spell: Bind Affinity [Magician]
  • Spell: Bind Affinity [Enchanter]
  • Spell: Bind Affinity

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Bind Affinity
Spell: Bind Affinity
Spell: Bind Affinity
Spell: Bind Affinity
ClassLevel
MAG12
ENC12
NEC12
DRU12
WIZ12
CLR10
SHM14
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant

  • Scroll 1 Sold By (44)

Didn't Rangers have this.
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2011 at 7:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971805207
Scholar
40 posts
I made a Ranger shortly after Kunark came out, was on Cazic-Thule. Could of sworn he got Bind Affinity. Cause I was annoyed that I could bind, but couldn't Gate.
▲ Page top
Weirdness
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2009 at 12:04 PM Rating: Decent
DaiaSpiritlight
Scholar
137 posts
OK I've been playing the game for a decade on and off. On my most recent return, suddenly a caster (Druid, Cleric, Mage, Cleric) can no longer cast bind affinity on himself/herself outside of a city?????? When did this change? I've attempted to bind in zones that I know I previously was able to do this since my return, and now I keep getting the message that I need to try a city.

Bug? Or new unwelcome feature?
____________________________
Bright Blessings to All!

Lady Daia Spiritlight
High Priestess of Quellious, Rathe Server
High Priestess of Quellious, Mischief Server
▲ Page top
Grouping
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2007 at 9:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593969404681
46 posts
So in order to cast on someone you have to be in a group... does that mean you can't cast on someone else unless you cast on yourself too?
▲ Page top
Grouping
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2007 at 11:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255563594
135 posts
Quote:
So in order to cast on someone you have to be in a group... does that mean you can't cast on someone else unless you cast on yourself too?


This spell is cast on your target only. The person you're casting it on just has to be in your group. This prevents you from randomly casting it on anyone you pass by or who passes by you.

---
Bluebie Doobiedoo (61 Shaman)
Leader, Covenant of Virtue
Prexus server
▲ Page top

I hate Allakhazam's Explainations
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 12:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768519780
69 posts
This spell will change your bind point to the location that you are currently in. You can cast on yourself and others, as long as they are in your group and in a city or allowed bind place.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 10 2003 at 1:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Congratulations, you're a moron.

Be nice, not everybody knows what "bound" means, I thought that was an excellant description for anyone starting Everquest

Self Only
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2003 at 2:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781623293
Scholar
31 posts
To cast on someone else you have to group with them, then cast the spell. Then disband group.

# Feb 03 2003 at 3:51 AM Rating: Decent

204 posts
is this a self-only spell mislabeled target/group? I've tried using it on others in my group and it won't stick.

Who other than self does it work on?

Heeling
16th Lvl Cleric
The Nameless

RE: Self only?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 10:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1662941905530
Scholar
164 posts
With my druid on self it will work anywhere... haven't had the opportunity to try it on anyone else yet with either the druid or my baby cleric
▲ Page top
RE: Self only?
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2003 at 2:20 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1594570734650
50 posts
It's gotta be in a town/designated area.

Example: Just outside CB or at the Orc Lift is fine. However, inside CB won't work (actually, it might... Never tried it.)

It will work with you anywhere, I am told.
▲ Page top
RE: Self only?
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2004 at 12:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1646612176368
2 posts
Tried it inside Kurn's Tower last night with my druid, didn't work. Didn't try on other side of zone point. I used it with my enchanter to bind just outside the zone point for Black Burrow worked fine there. So it appears it depends on where you are at when you try to bind.
▲ Page top
RE: Self only?
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2004 at 12:55 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592762358384
2 posts
If yer doing Kurn's...you can bind just outside on the ramp outside the tower...nice place to rest as well when the skellys are being a bit nasty. Pretty safe too...even though you're look out over the pit full of badgers and lizard skellies...they don't aggro on you from up there, unless you peg one of them with a spell.

"Badgers??? Badgers???? WE DON'T NEED NO STEEENKING BADGERS!!!"
▲ Page top
RE: Self only?
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2004 at 12:32 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
For self binds, this spell works anywhere except for specific dungeon/planar zones, so for example, you could bind in the middle of the lake in Lake Rathetear. To bind SOMEONE ELSE, you must be in a designated melee bind area, such as a city, adventure camp, or a spot like the gypsy camp in north karana. Step 20 steps away from the gypsy camp, and you can still bind yourself, but not anyone else.
▲ Page top
RE: Self only?
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2007 at 5:46 PM Rating: Default
Tuluvar
View User Forum
352 posts
No you can not bind anywhere in regular zones either. Try binding yourself near Giant Fort in Bwoods, it used to be possible, but it aint anymore. Ninja nerfed it seems
____________________________
Tuluvar
